zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Fosdick於1584年出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆時，他的父親Stephen Fosdick25歲，母親Sarah Joanne Scott19歲。他於1610年與Anna Harre在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈德利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托住了大約3年。他去世於1664年5月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年80歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托菲利普斯 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Fosdick于1584年出生在英国素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆时，他的父亲Stephen Fosdick25岁，母亲Sarah Joanne Scott19岁。他于1610年与Anna Harre在英国英格兰素福爾可哈德利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托住了大约3年。他去世于1664年5月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年80岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托菲利普斯 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Fosdick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Fosdyke, Lincolnshire, so called from the genitive case of the Old English byname Fōt, meaning ‘foot’ (or the Old Norse cognate Fótr), + Old English dīc ‘ditch, dike’ (see Ditch ). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Ditch
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): topographic name for someone who lived by a ditch, from Middle English dich(e), deche ‘ditch, dike’ (Old English dīc). Compare Dyke .

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave in the memorial list

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Fosdick was born in 1584, in Great Wenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Stephen Fosdick, was 25 and his mother, Sarah Joanne Scott, was 19. He married Anna Harre in 1610, in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He lived in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America for about 3 years. He died on 21 May 1664, in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Fosdick est né en 1584, à Great Wenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Fosdick, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah Joanne Scott, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Anna Harre en 1610, à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il a vécu à Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 3 ans. Il est décédé le 21 mai 1664, à Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Fosdick è nato il nel 1584 nel Great Wenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Stephen Fosdick, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Joanne Scott, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Anna Harre nel 1610, nel Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America per circa 3 anni. Morì il 21 maggio 1664, nel Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Fosdickが1584年にイギリススフォルクグレアト ウエンハムで生まれた時，父Stephen Fosdickは25歳，母Sarah Joanne Scottは19歳であった。1610年にイギリスイギリススフォルクハドレイグでAnna Harreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンに約3年間住んでいた。彼は1664年5月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチャーレストウンで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスチャーレストウンフィリップス ストレエト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Fosdick(이)가 1584년 영국 수폴크 그리트 웬함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Fosdick(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Joanne Scott(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하들리에서 Anna Harre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 약 3년 동안 살았다. 그는 1664년 5월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 찰레스타운 필립스 스트릿 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Fosdick nasceu em 1584, em Great Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Fosdick, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Joanne Scott, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Harre em 1610, em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele viveu em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America por quase 3 anos. Ele faleceu em 21 de maio de 1664, em Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Phipps Street Cemetery, Charlestown, Mid: филлипс стрит буринг гроунд, чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Fosdick родился в 1584 г. в местности грит венам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen Fosdick было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Joanne Scott, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Harre в 1610 г. в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он жил в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика около 3 лет. Он умер 21 мая 1664 г. в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности филлипс стрит буринг гроунд, чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen Fosdick nació en 1584, en Great Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Fosdick, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah Joanne Scott, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Anna Harre en 1610, en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 3 años. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1664, en Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
